description_long: This is a life-sized bronze sculpture of a man standing on a rectangular plinth. The figure is dressed in a long, formal coat with visible buttons and lapels, and he appears to be holding an object in his right hand, possibly a scroll or document. His left hand rests at his side, and his posture is upright and dignified, suggesting a commemorative or historical subject. The back of the sculpture reveals additional details, including a cylindrical object and decorative elements near the base, possibly a column or pedestal with floral motifs. The surface of the sculpture has a weathered, greenish patina typical of aged bronze, with subtle textural variations. The base is solid and slightly raised, providing stability and prominence to the figure.
description: A life-sized bronze statue of a man in a long coat, standing on a rectangular plinth with a weathered green patina and detailed accessories at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's formal attire, upright posture, and the object held in his right hand.
description_view_1: Front-left angle revealing the side of the coat, the man's profile, and the cylindrical object behind him.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the coat, the cylindrical object, and decorative base details.
description_view_3: Front-right angle showing the man's left side, the plinth, and the floral motif on the base.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
